Source: Azure OpenAI What's New
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/openai/whats-new
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Azure OpenAI What's New (Azure AI Foundry / Foundry Classic)

Note: URL redirects to /azure/foundry-classic/openai/whats-new — page rebranded to "Microsoft Foundry (classic)"
Page last updated: 2026-03-13

## February 2026
- GPT-Realtime-1.5 and GPT-Audio-1.5 models released
- Improved instruction following, multi-lingual support, and tool calling
- Available via existing chat completion APIs in Microsoft Foundry

## December 2025
- GPT-image-1.5 model available (limited access) — improved quality, editing, face preservation, inpainting; supports high input_fidelity; up to 1024x1536 and 1536x1024 pixels
- gpt-4o-mini-transcribe-2025-12-15: ~50% lower WER than previous, improved multilingual (Japanese, Indic), reduced hallucinations 4x on silence
- gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15: feature parity with full gpt-realtime model
- gpt-4o-mini-tts-2025-12-15: improved multilingual speech synthesis, more natural speech

## October 2025
- Realtime API SIP support for telephony connections
- gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize ASR model — speaker-attributed transcripts, 100+ languages, real-time
- GPT-image-1-mini for global deployments (balance of performance/cost; excludes image edits and input fidelity)
- PII detection content filter (built-in, blocks sensitive info in LLM outputs)

## September 2025
- GPT-5-codex available (limited access, requires registration)
- Sora video-to-video support

## August 2025
- Sora image-to-video support (Sweden Central, East US 2)
- Realtime API audio model GA (new voices: Marin and Cedar; image input; async function calling; conversation mode with VAD)
- Provisioned spillover GA
- GPT-5, GPT-5-mini, GPT-5-nano, GPT-5-chat models available (registration required for gpt-5)
- Model router with GPT-5 support

## July 2025
- GPT-image-1 update: input_fidelity parameter; partial image streaming in generation and edits APIs

## June 2025
- codex-mini and o3-pro released

## May 2025
- Sora video generation (preview, 2025-05-02 model)
- Spotlighting for prompt shields (preview) — tags input documents for lower trust
- Model router (preview) — automatically selects best underlying chat model

## April 2025
- Realtime API WebRTC support (preview)
- GPT-image-1 released (preview, limited access, 2025-04-15)
- o4-mini and o3 models released
- GPT-4.1 and GPT-4.1-nano released (1M token context limit)
- gpt-4o-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-tts audio models released

## March 2025
- Responses API (stateful, combines Chat Completions and Assistants API)
- computer-use-preview model (registration required)
- Provisioned spillover (preview)
- Per-request content filtering configuration via request header

## February 2025
- GPT-4.5 Preview
- Stored completions API
- o3-mini data zone standard deployments
- gpt-4o-mini-audio-preview (2024-12-17) and gpt-4o-mini-realtime-preview (2024-12-17)

## January 2025
- o3-mini (2025-01-31) released
- GPT-4o audio completions (East US 2 and Sweden Central)
- GPT Realtime API 2024-12-17 — prompt caching, new voices, RPM/TPM-based rate limits

## December 2024
- o1 reasoning model (limited access)
- Preference fine-tuning (DPO) preview — gpt-4o-2024-08-06
- Stored completions & distillation
- GPT-4o 2024-11-20
- Data zone provisioned deployment type
